---
title: "Demo 3 — Quarto counterpart with planted drift"
format: clean-revealjs
---

## Hajek Weights for ATT Estimation

The Hajek-weighted ATT estimator under conditional parallel trends:

$$ \hat{\tau}^{\text{Hajek}} = \frac{1}{N_{\text{treated}}} \sum_{i: D_i = 1} \cdots $$

where $\hat{p}(X_i)$ is the propensity score and $D_i$ is the treatment indicator.

<!-- PLANTED DRIFT: the Beamer source has the FULL Hajek weight formula; this Quarto
     copy has \cdots placeholder. The /qa-quarto critic should flag this; the fixer
     should sync the formula across both files. -->
